hash_input_description: Concatenation of the five section bodies (heading line excluded), each trimmed, joined with '\n', LF-normalised. Body = lines after the heading up to (but not including) the next heading of equal-or-higher level.
regression_rule: After CRAFT-09 extraction, concatenating the equivalent sections of references/captivation-rubric.md MUST yield an identical sha256 OR the move is impure and Plan 1 Task 4 must be reworked.
phase_13_note: Plan 13-04 rewrites the rubric body for schema v2 (0-16 range, 8 components, novelty_dedup dimension). This breaks the byte-identical lock by design. Hash is marked PHASE_13_PENDING until Plan 13-04 executor regenerates it per the Regeneration Protocol at the top of scripts/test-rubric-regression.js.
